title: iPSC to Dopaminergic Neurons
author: Elisangela Bressan
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bfpzjmp6

steps.title: Grow iPSC on matrigel-coated plates with...
steps.instruction: Grow iPSC on matrigel-coated plates with Essential E8 Flex medium until they cover 70-80% of the well area.

steps.title: Check if iPSC appear pluripotent and...
steps.instruction: Check if iPSC appear pluripotent and undifferentiated using a bright-field microscope. The iPSC should show a typical morphology with high nuclear-to-cytoplasm ratio, prominent nucleolus and densely packed colonies (Figure 1).

steps.title: Dissociate iPSC with Accutase into a single cell suspension
steps.instruction: Dissociate iPSC with Accutase into a single cell suspension.

steps.title: Dissociate iPSC into single cells with accutase (aprox
steps.instruction: Dissociate iPSC into single cells with accutase (aprox. 30 min at 37 °C) and replate at 200,000 per cm 2 on matrigel-coated plates and Essential 8 Flex medium (200 µL/cm 2 ) supplemented with 10 µM Y-27632 (until day 0 of differentiation). Matrigel coating: Use the same matrigel concentration applied for iPSC growth advised in the certificate of analyis of the product. Increase the coating time to 12 hours at 37 °C for differentiation. Use plates immediately after coating.

steps.title: Once iPSC cover 100% of the...
steps.instruction: Once iPSC cover 100% of the well area, usually 24 to 48 after single cell replating, start the differentiation into dopaminergic neurons.

steps.title: Start day 0 of differentiation by...
steps.instruction: Start day 0 of differentiation by changing the culture medium to differentiation medium (KSR medium; 200 µL/cm 2 ) supplemented with small molecules as described below: Day 0 -

steps.title: 100 nM LDN193189, 10 µM SB431542,...
steps.instruction: 100 nM LDN193189, 10 µM SB431542, 1 mM SHH, 2 µM Purmorphamine, 100 ng/mL FGF-8b Day 3 -

steps.title: 100 nM LDN193189, 10 µM SB431542,...
steps.instruction: 100 nM LDN193189, 10 µM SB431542, 1 mM SHH, 2 µM Purmorphamine, 100 ng/mL FGF-8b, 3 µM CHIR99021 Day 5 -

steps.title: 100 nM LDN193189, 1 mM SHH,...
steps.instruction: 100 nM LDN193189, 1 mM SHH, 2 µM Purmorphamine, 100 ng/mL FGF-8b, 3 µM CHIR99021 Day 7 -

steps.title: 100 nM LDN193189, 1 mM SHH,...
steps.instruction: 100 nM LDN193189, 1 mM SHH, 3 µM CHIR99021 Day 9 -

steps.title: 100 nM LDN193189, 1 mM SHH,...
steps.instruction: 100 nM LDN193189, 1 mM SHH, 3 µM CHIR99021 KSR (knockout serum replacement) medium composition and storage: Mix 409.5 mL of knockout DMEM/F-12 medium with 75 mL knockout serum replacement (15%), 5 mL GlutaMAX (2 mM), 5 mL MEM Non-Essential Amino Acids (1%), 0.5 mL 2-mercaptoethanol (55 µM) and 5 mL Penicillin-Streptomycin (1%). Store media without small molecules and growth factors at 4 °C for up to one week or at -20 °C for up to four weeks.

steps.title: 100 % KSR Day 5 -
steps.instruction: 100 % KSR Day 5 -

steps.title: 75% KSR/25% N2 Day 7 -
steps.instruction: 75% KSR/25% N2 Day 7 -

steps.title: 50% KSR/50% N2 Day 9 -
steps.instruction: 50% KSR/50% N2 Day 9 -

steps.title: 25% KSR/75% N2 N2 medium composition and storage
steps.instruction: 25% KSR/75% N2 N2 medium composition and storage: Mix 475 mL Neurobasal medium with 5 mL N2 supplement (1%), 10 mL B27 supplement (2%), 5 mL GlutaMAX (2 mM) and 5 mL Penicillin-Streptomycin (1%). Store media without small molecules and growth factors at 4 °C for up to one week or at -20 °C for up to four weeks.

steps.title: From day 11, replace KSR/N2 by...
steps.instruction: From day 11, replace KSR/N2 by NB/B27 medium supplemented with the following small molecules and growth factors: 3 µM CHIR99021 (until day 13) 0.2 mM Ascorbic acid 20 ng/mL BDNF 10 µM DAPT 1 mM db-cAMP 20 ng/mL GDNF 1 ng/mL TGFβ3 NB/B27 medium composition and storage: Mix 485 mL Neurobasal (NB) medium with 10 mL B27 supplement (2%) and 5 mL Penicillin-Streptomycin (1%). Store media without small molecules and growth factors at 4 °C for up to one week or at -20 °C for up to four weeks.

steps.title: It is highly recommended to avoid...
steps.instruction: It is highly recommended to avoid the storage of differentiation medium containing small molecules and growth factors. NOTE

steps.title: Dopaminergic precursors can be frozen on day 25 of differentiaion
steps.instruction: Dopaminergic precursors can be frozen on day 25 of differentiaion. NOTE

steps.title: An additional replating at lower cell...
steps.instruction: An additional replating at lower cell densities (100,000 per cm 2 ) can be performed on day 32 of differentiation for single-cell imaging.

steps.title: On day 26, perform media change...
steps.instruction: On day 26, perform media change (200 µL/cm 2 ) to remove dead cells and debris. Add freshly prepared differentiation medium supplemented with small molecules and growth factors, as described in step 8 (without Y-27632).

steps.title: From day 29, perform media changes...
steps.instruction: From day 29, perform media changes every 3-4 days as described in step 9 .

steps.title: On day 65 of differentiation, process...
steps.instruction: On day 65 of differentiation, process differentiated cells for assays as desired.
